subject: DevOps
title: Providers: The Bridge to Clouds
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Providers: The Bridge to Clouds.

hook.text: Terraform works with AWS, Azure, GCP, Cloudflare, GitHub, and hundreds more. How? Providers.

buildup.text: A provider is a plugin that translates Terraform code into API calls for a specific platform.

discovery.text: The AWS provider knows how to create EC2 instances. The GitHub provider knows how to create repositories.

twist.text: You can use multiple providers in one project. Create an AWS server and a Cloudflare DNS record in the same plan.

climax.text: The Terraform Registry hosts thousands of providers. Community-built providers cover niche services too.

punchline.text: Providers connect Terraform to any platform. One language, many clouds.

quiz.question: What does a Terraform provider do?
options: It translates Terraform code into API calls for a specific platform
